examples: Beware of an overreliance on beta testing.
Overreliance on experience, intuition, and gut feeling is a surefire way of increasing waste.
Does an overreliance on machine memory shut down other important ways of understanding the world?
Cyprus's bailout has sparked fresh warnings from policy makers about overreliance on financial sector revenues.
An overreliance on patient surveys, she says, only inflames the problem of overtreatment.
